alkylation reagent: alkylation with 50 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature
alkylation concentration: alkylation with 50 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature
cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37 °C with trypsin (Promega; V5280)
collision energy: 20 data-dependent MS/MS scans at 30% normalized collision energy
enrichment method: two rounds of affinity purification were performed to enrich SFB-REIIBP
fractionation method: we employed the subcellular fractionation approach to obtain NO fractions
instrument: using a TIMS quadrupole time-of-flight timsTOF Pro 2 instrument
labeling: Label-free quantification was performed with MSFragger
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM DTT at 55 °C for 45 min
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM DTT at 55 °C for 45 min
